fields.description: Turn location capture on or off. Off = visits save normally, no location.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Google Maps key (used on the server only). Blank = addresses and maps are skipped.
fields.label: Google Maps API Key

fields.description: Map thumbnail zoom (blank = 16; higher = closer to the pin).
fields.label: Map Thumbnail Zoom

fields.description: Test the Google key. Save first.
fields.label: Check Connection
Map Display
fields.description: Choose who draws the in-app maps. Address lookups always use Google.
Maps on task cards, the task popup, and the Desk activity list. Blank = OpenStreetMap (free).
fields.label: Thumbnail Map Provider

fields.description: Maps in the location pop-ups (out-of-range / capture confirmation). Blank = Google.
fields.label: Dialog Map Provider

fields.description: Address lookups always use Google. Not changeable.
fields.label: Geocoding Provider

fields.description: Lead groups whose in-person visits must be at the doctor's clinic. Empty = off.
fields.label: Location-Tracked Grains

fields.description: Role allowed to move a clinic's pin. Blank = System Manager only.
fields.label: Manager Override Role
